title: タイマン！　スケバン！　勝負服！

text_block_list.text:
At the training track, Hishi Amazon tries out her
signature racewear to see how well it fits.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Nice!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
It fits like a glove! No complaints over here,
Teach.

I ask her if she came up with the design all by
herself.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, there's kind of a backstory to how my
racewear ended up lookin' like this.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I want it to look like one of those
sailor-esque school uniforms!

text_block_list.name: Racewear Designer
text_block_list.text:
Sure, we can base it off a sailor uniform. Do you
have any additional requests for the design?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'll let you handle it! I'm pretty sure you've got a
good idea of what I want!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
(Yeah! I remember watchin' an action movie on a
flight to Japan when I was a kid...)

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: (The main character of Gangster Girl Fighter wore this awesome, black school uniform with a long skirt. That outfit'd be perfect for me!)

text_block_list.name: Racewear Designer
text_block_list.text:
Understood. I'll make sure to turn your vision into
a reality.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Heh, looks like it's ready to go. Let's see how it—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What?! This looks nothing like what gangster girls
wear! It looks more like...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: So yeah. Instead of getting an edgy sailor-type school uniform, I got an actual sailor uniform.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm happy all the same, but lookin' back on it, I
probably should've been more specific about
what I wanted.
choice_data_list: I'm glad you still like it.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! With this on, I'll take on anyone in a race—

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Oh man, I nearly forgot!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've been trying to think of a pose that'll match
my signature racewear!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta give it everything I've got during
winning concerts too, after all. And it'd be better
to have a pose for this outfit, don'tcha think?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Great, let's work on it together. Come with me,
Teach!

Hishi Amazon leads me to the outdoor stage
where we start an impromptu performance
practice session.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Time to go all out and put a buncha
poses to the test!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Quick, throw me an idea, Teach! What do you
think would look good?
choice_data_list: Squat menacingly like a gangster girl.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that'd definitely fit the theme of my
racewear.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Ahoy there! How's this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Haha, good! Looks like we've got a winner
already. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
All right! Let me try acting like a full-on sailor
now!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You've gotta act the part if you wanna play the
part, right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I'm good at this charades thing—I play it with kids
all the time! Let me give you a little taster!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aircraft carrier JS Teach spotted at two o'clock!
Mobilize forces, it's time for a one-on-one battle!

Hishi Amazon's passionate search for a new pose
devolves into a game of battleships.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
So you're suggestin' I pose as if I really were
wearin' a long, black gangster uniform instead?
Okay, then... how about this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, this feels good. I've got the squat down, so
now I've gotta put on a real scary glare, and...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey! What're you lookin' at? You lookin' for a
fight or something?! Haha, it'd be funny if I said
something like that too.

text_block_list.name: Kitten
text_block_list.text: Mew...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
What's this kitten rubbing all up on me for? Did it
lose its way or somethin'?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Aren't you scared of this terrifyin' pose I'm pulling
off?

text_block_list.name: Kitten
text_block_list.text: Meeeow. ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Tch, you don't know the meaning of fear, do you?
Bold of you to be cozyin' up to someone who can
silence crying children with a glare!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Well, whatever. Come on, kitty cat! I'll cook you
up a treat if your tummy's rumblin'!

And so, Hishi Amazon goes off to look after the
kitten.
